LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-14-2012 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arb And Dismiss Or In The Alternative To Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Aug-24-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SAM SIU's Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Or In The Alternative To Stay Proceedings is off calendar because the moving party failed to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-31-2012 Set For Trial On Oct-15-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
